name: listbox
title: useListbox
description: Shared listbox state and keyboard navigation hook. Manages selection, highlight, and container ARIA props for listbox-pattern components like menu and navigation-list.

docs.description: Shared listbox state and keyboard navigation hook. Manages selection, highlight, and container ARIA props for listbox-pattern components like menu and navigation-list.

parameters.name: idPrefix
parameters.description: Prefix for generating aria-activedescendant IDs. Each option should have id="{idPrefix}-{itemId}".

parameters.name: selectedId
parameters.description: Controlled selected item ID. When provided, the hook is in controlled mode for selection.

parameters.name: defaultSelectedId
parameters.description: Initial selected item ID for uncontrolled mode.

parameters.name: highlightedId
parameters.description: Controlled highlighted item ID. When provided, the hook is in controlled mode for highlight.

parameters.name: defaultHighlightedId
parameters.description: Initial highlighted item ID for uncontrolled mode.

parameters.name: onSelect
parameters.description: Called when the selected item changes.

parameters.name: onHighlightChange
parameters.description: Called when the highlighted item changes via keyboard navigation.

parameters.name: wrap
parameters.description: Whether keyboard navigation wraps from last item to first (and vice versa).

parameters.name: onKeyDown
parameters.description: Additional keydown handler called before the built-in navigation handler. Call event.preventDefault() to suppress default keyboard navigation.

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: ARIA role for the container element.

parameters.name: itemRole
parameters.description: ARIA role for each item element.

parameters.name: typeahead
parameters.description: Enable type-ahead character search to jump to matching items.

returns.description: Object with selection state, highlight state, event handlers, and a prop-getter for the container element.

properties.name: handleItemActivate
properties.description: Call on item click or Enter/Space to select and activate it.

properties.name: handleItemHighlight
properties.description: Call on item hover/focus to highlight it.

properties.name: getContainerProps
properties.description: Prop-getter for the listbox container. Returns ref, role, tabIndex, aria-activedescendant, and onKeyDown. Accepts an optional external ref that is composed with the internal ref.

notes.title: Keyboard Navigation
notes.content: Arrow keys move highlight through items with role="option" inside the container. Enter and Space select the highlighted item. Navigation uses @diffgazer/keys's useNavigation internally.

notes.title: Controlled & Uncontrolled
notes.content: Both selection and highlight support controlled and uncontrolled modes via useControllableState. Pass selectedId/highlightedId for controlled, or use defaultSelectedId/defaultHighlightedId for uncontrolled.

notes.title: Used By
notes.content: Built into menu and navigation-list components. Provides the shared listbox interaction pattern so each component only needs to handle its own rendering.
